name: Sarah Chen
headline: Fractional GTM advisor — ex-Qualtrics VP Sales
bio: Eighteen years scaling enterprise SaaS GTM. VP of Sales at Qualtrics through the IPO, then VP of Revenue at Domo. Mission-aligned with applied AI in education and healthcare.
lookingFor: A fractional GTM advisor seat at a Utah AI or data-infra startup at seed to Series A. 10–15 hrs/week, equity-only. Especially interested in education-AI and applied healthcare. Not open to full-time.

name: Marcus Okafor
headline: Life sciences CEO — 2× exits, FDA-experienced
bio: Two-time life-sciences CEO. Led a U of U cardiac-imaging spinout from seed to Series B and acquisition by GE. Deep experience navigating FDA 510(k) and PMA pathways.
lookingFor: A CEO seat at a Utah bio or medtech spinout — ideally U of U or BYU lineage, pre-seed to Series A. Full-time, mostly equity with a runway-sized salary. Strongest fit for a company about to enter clinical or first-in-human.

name: Priya Patel
headline: BYU CS senior — full-stack, ML-curious
bio: Senior at BYU studying Computer Science with a minor in Statistics. Built a deep-learning pipeline for crop-disease detection during a USDA-funded research stint.
lookingFor: A paid summer engineering internship at a Utah AI or agtech spinout. Full-time availability June through August, fractional during the school year. Most excited about applied ML problems with real-world data.

name: David Kim
headline: VP Engineering — scaled Pluralsight platform 5×
bio: Fifteen years engineering leadership. VP Engineering at Pluralsight where I scaled the platform team from 12 to 60 and led the migration from monolith to microservices. Looking for a VP Eng or CTO role at a Series A/B Utah software company. Open to full-time or fractional CTO arrangements while I weigh options.

name: Emily Rasmussen
headline: Regulatory affairs — defense & aerospace
bio: Twelve years in DoD acquisition and ITAR/EAR compliance. Former program manager at Northrop Grumman before joining a Utah hypersonics spinout as VP of Government Affairs. Looking for fractional advisory work with USU defense/aerospace spinouts navigating Phase II SBIR or AFWERX TACFI.

name: Jason Nguyen
headline: Cybersecurity engineer — offensive security
bio: Eight years in offensive security. Red team lead at a Big-4 firm, then security engineer at Recursion. CISSP + OSCP. Looking for a senior engineering or founding-engineer role at a Utah cyber or AI-security startup, ideally Series A.

name: Rachel Stewart
headline: Marketing & brand — B2B SaaS go-to-market
bio: Ten years marketing leadership at high-growth Utah SaaS — VP Marketing at Lucid through hypergrowth, then CMO at a Series B fintech. Looking for fractional CMO or brand-strategy advisory work, 8–12 hours/week, equity-only.

name: Omar Haddad
headline: Energy / cleantech advisor — ex-DOE
bio: Former DOE program officer focused on grid storage and small-modular nuclear. Ten years in energy policy and project finance. Looking for advisory roles with USU or U of U energy spinouts, especially around DOE grant strategy and project-finance partnerships. Mentor-only — no compensation needed.

name: Jen Walker
headline: COO — operations & manufacturing scale-up
bio: Twenty years in operations leadership. COO at an advanced-manufacturing Series B that scaled from 30 to 280 employees over three years. Strong on supply chain, quality systems, ISO 9001/13485, and lean ops. Looking for a full-time COO or VP Ops role at a Utah hard-tech company at Series A or later.

name: Ben Thomas
headline: Fintech founder — 1 exit, looking for the next thing
bio: Founded and exited a payments-infra company to a public fintech. Twelve years in financial services, deep experience with KYC/AML and bank partnerships. Considering a co-founder role at a Utah fintech or AI-fintech startup at pre-seed or seed.

name: Aisha Johnson
headline: ML engineer — applied LLMs, retrieval systems
bio: Six years ML engineering. Built retrieval-augmented LLM systems at a top AI lab. Looking for senior or staff engineering roles at a Utah AI startup, seed or Series A. Will consider full-time if mission and team are right.

name: Tom Richards
headline: Hardware engineer — aerospace, ex-Owlet
bio: Ten years hardware engineering. Led firmware at Owlet, then principal engineer at a Utah hypersonics startup. Looking for a senior hardware or systems-engineering role at a USU or U of U defense/aerospace spinout.

name: Laura Mendez
headline: Bio business development — academic-to-commercial
bio: Eight years BD at a top life-sciences company, focused on partnering academic spinouts with pharma. Looking for a fractional business-development role at a U of U bio/medtech spinout to drive licensing and pharma-partnership conversations.

name: Kevin Larsen
headline: Sales lead — early-stage AI / dev tools
bio: First sales hire at two seed-stage Utah dev-tools startups, scaled both to $2M+ ARR before they raised Series A. Looking for the same kind of role — first or second sales hire at a seed-stage Utah AI or dev-tools company. Cash + equity.

name: Natalie Park
headline: U of U bioE PhD candidate — looking for advisor work
bio: Fourth-year bioengineering PhD candidate at the University of Utah, working on biosensors for early sepsis detection. Looking for advisor or mentor relationships with non-bio Utah startups to broaden my exposure to commercialization. Mentor-only, ~5 hrs/week.
